description:
A powerful, intuitive, ultra-customizable and dead set on mailing

Mailbird is an innovative email client that revitalizes your emailing experience with a modern design and streamlined navigation. It integrates all your communication, collaboration, and productivity apps into one workspace, allowing you to manage your inbox efficiently. With features like sender blocking and inbox categories, it helps you focus on important messages and reduce clutter. Additionally, Mailbird offers a unique email template tool and leverages artificial intelligence to create natural-sounding emails quickly, enhancing your productivity and email management.
New Features
- Added Microsoft OneDrive and Outlook In-Place Archive apps.

Enhancements
- Fixed some clipping issues with long text strings in other languages than English.
- Updated internal browser.
- Removed Skype, as it's now Microsoft Teams.
- IMAP, POP3 and SMTP will now try to use the default IP version, rather than always IPv4.

Fixed Bugs
- Fixed rare sending issue with Posteo.
- IMAP search will no longer surround text with quotes, as it's not part of the specs.
- Fixed a rare issue where email content would render multiple times when the email was unusually formed.
- Fixed rare crash that could occur if messages referenced each other as replies.
- Fixed issue with the print dialog sometimes opening twice.
- Fixed random crash that could occur when viewing an email.
- Improved calendar invitation processing when encountering malformed invites.
- Fixed an issue with mails getting stuck in Drafts after sending.
- Fixed issue with Mailbird crashing on startup in rare cases.
- Fixed issue with not being able to switch between accounts in Google apps.
- Fixed issue with certain apps not appearing until after the first restart.
